runTitle: Vercel Release Smoke - v8.12.87 Parallel Deploy Verification

Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00590-s2t is serving 100% traffic
Cloud Run runtime limits remain cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
Vercel usage check passed with billed 0.0000 USD

Production conversational AI QA was not rerun because this release did not change AI prompt routing, stream contracts, model/provider policy, tool schemas, response formatting, or Vision routing
Vision real-image QA was not in scope because this release did not change Vision routing or provider behavior

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag pipeline completed successfully, deploy jobs overlapped after runner capacity was raised, resource queues were empty, and production health checks passed.
The release-facing smoke covers deployment authority, version propagation, CI timing diagnostics, and backend health with durable evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.12.87 production release smoke; effective 19.8825 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 17661.

artifacts.label: v8.12.87 release parallel deploy smoke evidence

completedImprovements.title: v8.12.87 release deployed with frontend and AI Engine deploy overlap
completedImprovements.evidence: GitLab tag pipeline 2563996427 succeeded; deploy and deploy_ai_engine started within 1 second and overlapped for 197s; production /api/version and Cloud Run /health passed.

notes: This run intentionally forced AI Engine version metadata update so the release tag exercised both deploy jobs.
deploy_parallelism reported overlap_detected with 197s overlap and no resource queue entries.
Cloud Build used default machine type and Cloud Run limits remained within the project free-tier guard baseline.
